messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document. Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types. Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text. Section metadata: { "node_id": "0098", "title": "轻量化游戏出海港澳台的红利消退具备深度玩法的产品更获市场青睐", "page_index": 28, "page_range": "28-1" } Section text: ## 轻量化游戏出海港澳台的红利消退具备深度玩法的产品更获市场青睐 港澳台移动游戏收入榜宛如一面镜子映照市场的复杂构成：榜首是深耕本地多年的博彩类游戏《星城Online》；紧随其后的是大陆出海SLG的成功代表《寒霜启示录》；同时，全球性的IP产品如《宝可梦TCG Pocket》《天堂》《SD钢弹 G世代 永恒》等也在同台竞技。这种“本土产品、大陆出海、国际大作”三分天下的局面标志着市场的多元与成熟。但这其中也伴随着残酷的筛选：轻量化小游戏出海港澳台的红利期正在终结，市场偏好明确转向至玩法更具深度的产品。新品收入榜中，除《不休旅途：绘卷世界》外，传统意义上的轻度游戏已难觅踪影。取而代之的是如《杖剑传说》《奔奔王国》《七骑士 Re:BIRTH》等，这些产品要么本身是玩法融合的中重度游戏，要么是带有强IP和深养成线的作品。 2025年港澳台移动游戏收入TOP榜
排名icon游戏名厂商全年流水(亿元)同比增长率
1星城Online星城OnlineWanin International15.3314.63%
2寒霜启示录点点互动12.4249.54%
3最后的战争First Fun11.31-21.17%
4Garena 传说对决Gerena10.3814.28%
5杖剑传说雷霆游戏7.402025年新品
6天堂WNCSOFT6.06-6.85%
7天堂MNCSOFT5.98-3.39%
8宝可梦 TCG PocketThe Pokemon Company5.8736.91%
9SD钢弹 G世代 永恒万代南梦宫5.022025年新品
10崩坏：星穹铁道米哈游4.93-10.59%
2025年港澳台移动游戏收入新品TOP榜

message.content:
This section supports retrieval for queries regarding the 2025 mobile gaming market in Hong Kong, Macau, and Taiwan. It answers questions about:
- **Topics:** Regional mobile game market composition, genre preference shifts, and mainland Chinese game export trends.
- **Entities:** Top-grossing titles (e.g., 《星城Online》, 《寒霜启示录》, 《杖剑传说》, 《宝可梦 TCG Pocket》, 《SD钢弹 G世代 永恒》) and publishers/developers (e.g., Wanin International, 点点互动, 雷霆游戏, NCSOFT, 万代南梦宫, 米哈游, 4399, NEXON, 网石游戏).
- **Dates:** Full-year 2025 revenue tracking period; specific 2025 launch months for new releases (January through October 2025).
- **Claims:** The export bonus period for lightweight/casual games to the region is ending; market preference has shifted toward mid-core, deep-gameplay, and strong-IP products; the market is mature and tripartite, split among local products, mainland Chinese exports, and international IP titles.
- **Tables & Metrics:** Two ranked datasets: (1) 2025 Overall Revenue TOP 10, listing rank, game name, publisher, annual revenue (in 亿元), and YoY growth rate; (2) 2025 New Release Revenue TOP 10, listing rank, game name, publisher, annual revenue, overall market rank, and launch date.
- **Evidence Types:** Quantitative revenue rankings, year-over-year growth metrics, publisher performance data, and genre trend analysis, sourced from 点点数据 (Diandian Data).

response_text:
This section supports retrieval for queries regarding the 2025 mobile gaming market in Hong Kong, Macau, and Taiwan. It answers questions about:
- **Topics:** Regional mobile game market composition, genre preference shifts, and mainland Chinese game export trends.
- **Entities:** Top-grossing titles (e.g., 《星城Online》, 《寒霜启示录》, 《杖剑传说》, 《宝可梦 TCG Pocket》, 《SD钢弹 G世代 永恒》) and publishers/developers (e.g., Wanin International, 点点互动, 雷霆游戏, NCSOFT, 万代南梦宫, 米哈游, 4399, NEXON, 网石游戏).
- **Dates:** Full-year 2025 revenue tracking period; specific 2025 launch months for new releases (January through October 2025).
- **Claims:** The export bonus period for lightweight/casual games to the region is ending; market preference has shifted toward mid-core, deep-gameplay, and strong-IP products; the market is mature and tripartite, split among local products, mainland Chinese exports, and international IP titles.
- **Tables & Metrics:** Two ranked datasets: (1) 2025 Overall Revenue TOP 10, listing rank, game name, publisher, annual revenue (in 亿元), and YoY growth rate; (2) 2025 New Release Revenue TOP 10, listing rank, game name, publisher, annual revenue, overall market rank, and launch date.
- **Evidence Types:** Quantitative revenue rankings, year-over-year growth metrics, publisher performance data, and genre trend analysis, sourced from 点点数据 (Diandian Data).
